/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/thermoconsole.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/thermoconsole.dir/src/graphics.c.o CMakeFiles/thermoconsole.dir/src/input.c.o CMakeFiles/thermoconsole.dir/src/rom.c.o CMakeFiles/thermoconsole.dir/src/lua_api.c.o CMakeFiles/thermoconsole.dir/src/script.c.o CMakeFiles/thermoconsole.dir/src/system_api.c.o CMakeFiles/thermoconsole.dir/src/audio.c.o CMakeFiles/thermoconsole.dir/src/platform/platform_pc.c.o -o thermoconsole  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_mixer -lSDL2 -llua5.4 -lm -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_mixer -llua5.4 -lm
